# Data Transport Declarations

Prefer `Ref[T, F("source", "field")]` for upstream data references. Use `TaskData` / `DataItem` / `DTRela` when you need to build data graphs dynamically.

## Annotation helpers

::: astrum.data_transport.From

::: astrum.data_transport.To

## Explicit data objects

::: astrum.data_transport.TaskData

::: astrum.data_transport.DataItem

::: astrum.data_transport.DTRela
